description_long: This is a compact, modern chaise upholstered in a deep green fabric, featuring a gently curved backrest that wraps around the sides for a cozy, enveloping feel. The backrest is vertically segmented, adding subtle visual interest and texture to the otherwise smooth surface. Both armrests are integrated into the continuous curve of the backrest, providing support on either side. The seat is wide and plush, designed for comfortable lounging, and appears to be a single, attached cushion. The chaise stands on four slender, straight legs made of dark metal, giving it a light, elevated appearance. Its overall design is minimalist yet inviting, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or stylish outdoor settings.
description: A modern green chaise with a curved, segmented backrest and integrated armrests, supported by slim dark metal legs. The seat is wide and plush, offering a comfortable lounging experience.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the seat, the curved segmented backrest, and both integrated armrests.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the curve of the backrest, and the slim profile of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, continuous back of the chaise and the alignment of the legs.
description_view_3: Left-side view similar to the right, emphasizing the chaise's depth, backrest curvature, and leg design.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium-height, gently curved, and vertically segmented, creating a visually appealing and supportive structure. It wraps around the sides, forming a continuous line with the armrests and adding to the chaise's modern aesthetic.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, seamlessly integrated into the curved backrest for a unified look.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, slender, and made of dark metal, with a minimalist design and no visible decorative elements. They are slightly angled outward for stability.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid deep green fabric with vertical segmentation on the backrest, giving it a subtle, textured appearance without any additional patterns.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, wide, attached seat cushion that spans the width of the chaise, with no loose or additional cushions visible.
